Question: What is the mean daily antibiotic usage rate per 100 patient bed-days, averaged across selected hospital laboratories monitoring different resistant pathogens under specific antimicrobial stewardship policies including tiered restrictions, cycling strategies during high resistance alerts, formulary-approved use with automatic audits, and compassionate-use exceptions?
SQL Query: SELECT AVG(DefinedDailyDoseRate) AS DefinedDailyDoseRate FROM (SELECT DefinedDailyDoseRate AS DefinedDailyDoseRate FROM AntimicrobialStewardshipMetrics WHERE LaboratorySiteCode = "LS-304 community hospital microbiology bench with limited MALDI capability" AND PhenotypicResistanceProfile = "metallo-beta-lactamase (NDM) expressing Enterobacteriaceae with sporadic tigecycline resistance" AND FormularyRestrictionLevel = "Tiered restriction: reserve agents for microbiologically documented infections only" UNION ALL SELECT DefinedDailyDoseRate AS DefinedDailyDoseRate FROM AntimicrobialStewardshipMetrics WHERE LaboratorySiteCode = "LS-203 regional infectious disease reference centre — transplant unit liaison" AND PhenotypicResistanceProfile = "Vancomycin-intermediate Staphylococcus aureus phenotype with teicoplanin susceptibility" AND FormularyRestrictionLevel = "Antimicrobial cycling policy activated during high-resistance sentinel events" UNION ALL SELECT DefinedDailyDoseRate AS DefinedDailyDoseRate FROM AntimicrobialStewardshipMetrics WHERE LaboratorySiteCode = "LS-910 antimicrobial stewardship sentinel reporting site (multisite network)" AND PhenotypicResistanceProfile = "metallo-beta-lactamase (NDM) expressing Enterobacteriaceae with sporadic tigecycline resistance" AND FormularyRestrictionLevel = "Restricted to formulary-approved indications with automatic audit" UNION ALL SELECT DefinedDailyDoseRate AS DefinedDailyDoseRate FROM AntimicrobialStewardshipMetrics WHERE LaboratorySiteCode = "LS-102 satellite molecular diagnostics node (pediatric focus)" AND PhenotypicResistanceProfile = "ESBL-producing Enterobacterales with concomitant fluoroquinolone resistance and aminoglycoside susceptibility" AND FormularyRestrictionLevel = "Compassionate-use exception pathway with case-by-case stewardship oversight");
